decisions.summary: Eclipse runtime MVP is not implemented in this delivery track.
decisions.reason: Repository has foundation contracts/tests/docs but no buildable Eclipse plugin runtime project.
expected_unblock_artifacts: deterministic build command via Tycho or Gradle (documented and CI-capable)

decisions.summary: Project skeleton implementation skipped due blocked runtime decision.
decisions.reason: No runtime plugin project is pursued in current track; foundation-only state remains explicit.

decisions.summary: Build and connection MVP implementation skipped due blocked runtime decision.
decisions.reason: No Eclipse runtime build pipeline is enabled in current track.

decisions.summary: Context handoff and command runtime implementation skipped due blocked runtime decision.
decisions.reason: Runtime plugin delivery is blocked; only foundation contracts are maintained.

decisions.summary: Task/artifact runtime view implementation and runtime smoke checklist are blocked in this track.
decisions.reason: Eclipse runtime is not claimed as MVP; views remain foundation contracts with browser fallback guidance.

decisions.summary: Eclipse runtime is unblocked for bootstrap delivery in the EAC track.
decisions.reason: Repository now includes plugin metadata, deterministic build bootstrap command, client core and bootstrap smoke evidence.

decisions.summary: Build bootstrap path uses dockerized Gradle for deterministic runtime packaging.
decisions.reason: Host-independent command improves reproducibility while keeping runtime bootstrap lightweight.

decisions.summary: Eclipse runtime command registry, Eclipse AbstractHandler adapters and Docker/Xvfb installed-Eclipse evidence are implemented for analyze/review/patch/new/evolve.
decisions.reason: Command execution is routed through capability gates, existing generic Hub goal paths and explicit degraded/policy-denied handling; installed Eclipse evidence now passes without skip.

decisions.summary: Task/artifact/approval/audit/repair/TUI/policy-fallback runtime views are wired through runtime models, Eclipse ViewPart adapters and Docker/Xvfb installed-Eclipse evidence.
decisions.reason: Core operational views load Hub runtime data through testable models while Eclipse UI classes remain thin adapter shells; installed UI startup evidence passes without skip.

decisions.summary: Policy-denied and browser-fallback UX is explicit and governance-safe.
decisions.reason: Fallback paths remain backend-authorized and never bypass policy enforcement.

decisions.summary: Runtime Java unit tests cover command dispatch, degraded-state mapping, capability gating and profile validation.
decisions.reason: Deterministic JUnit suite runs in dockerized Gradle test mode without live backend dependencies.

decisions.summary: Runtime integration/UI tests validate command execution, view loading, context preview and explicit confirmation paths.
decisions.reason: Integration suite uses a local stub backend server and verifies no implicit apply/execute behavior.

decisions.summary: Security and governance tests prevent policy bypass and verify token redaction and degraded response handling.
decisions.reason: Denied, unauthorized, stale and malformed backend responses are explicitly asserted in runtime test coverage.

decisions.summary: API contract compatibility tests lock runtime request/response shapes and generic Hub endpoint contracts.
decisions.reason: Breaking payload or routing changes now fail the Java runtime contract suite and Python Hub route contract suite.

decisions.summary: Headless runtime smoke and CI lane are implemented for Eclipse runtime claims.
decisions.reason: Runtime classification now depends on both bootstrap and headless smoke evidence, with CI gate execution.

decisions.summary: Runtime documentation truth pass aligns all Eclipse runtime claims with executable repository evidence.
decisions.reason: Docs now reflect delivered command/view runtime, headless smoke gates and explicit deferred boundaries.

decisions.summary: Runtime merge readiness report is generated with explicit merge-safe recommendation and evidence references.
decisions.reason: Report now includes Java unit/integration/security/contract tests, smoke gates and CI lane links.
